reviewFocus: Check whether each claim is proportional to the supplied synthetic evidence labels.
Flag broad claims that lack direct evidence, quoted support, or explicit caller-owned caveats.
Use stable generic finding keys when a support or caveat gap could recur across implementations.
Keep approval, routing, remediation ownership, publication, and domain interpretation caller-owned.
outOfScope: Do not infer private sources, hidden approvals, real source freshness, or domain-specific policy from synthetic labels.
Do not approve publication, deployment, remediation, routing, retention, purchasing, or other external action.
Do not treat generic evidence labels as proof outside this caller-sanitized packet.
